Arts Undergraduate Society

McGill University

Get Involved with AUS

Join us and make a difference in the Arts community

There are many ways to get involved with AUS! Whether you want to run for an executive position, join a committee, or participate in our events, we welcome all Arts students.

Committees

Academic Affairs

Advocate for academic policies and student rights

Social Events

Plan and execute exciting campus events

Equity & Inclusion

Promote diversity and inclusive practices

Communications

Manage social media and student outreach

Upcoming Opportunities

Fall Elections

October 2025 - Run for council positions

Committee Applications

Open year-round - Apply anytime

Volunteer Programs

Help out at events and initiatives

AUS Events Calendar

Stay up to date with all AUS events and important dates

Note: Note: This is a sample calendar. The AUS will need to replace this with their actual Google Calendar embed code. To get your calendar embed code, go to your Google Calendar settings, select the calendar to share, and copy the embed code from the "Integrate calendar" section.

Arts Undergraduate Society

Representing Arts students at McGill University since 1908
